docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,419.01 FILED BY NACHOR DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT SOLARES EDGAR ENRIQUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
INVALID, DEFT. NOT NAMED. NO MAILING DONE ON SUB- SERVICES.
